since_last: 58% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.17%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.02% · BTC -2.72% · Gold -2.53% · Nasdaq100 +2.32%. 58% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.17%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.17%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.64%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.64%, SMR +10.69%, SMCI +10.08%, INTC +9.37%, KLAC +8.80%. Laggards: SPCX -9.13%, INOD -7.63%, IBM -5.40%, MDB -3.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.13% at $174.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.13% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
